text: A bag contains 5 red balls and 3 blue balls. Two balls are drawn without replacement. What is the probability that both balls are red?
A standard six-sided die is rolled twice. What is the probability that the sum of the two rolls equals 9?
A deck of 52 cards is shuffled. What is the probability that the top two cards are both aces?
Three fair coins are flipped. Given that at least two coins show heads, what is the probability that all three show heads?
A jar contains 4 red, 3 green, and 2 yellow marbles. One marble is drawn at random. What is the probability it is not yellow?
In a class of 30 students, 12 play soccer and 10 play basketball, and 5 play both. A student is chosen at random. What is the probability the student plays soccer or basketball but not both?
Two dice are rolled. What is the probability that the product of the two numbers showing is even?
A card is drawn from a standard 52-card deck. What is the probability it is a red face card?
Five fair coins are flipped. What is the probability of getting exactly three heads?
A box has 6 white and 4 black socks. Two socks are drawn without replacement. What is the probability they are the same color?
A number is chosen at random from the integers 1 through 20. What is the probability it is divisible by 3 or 5?
Two cards are drawn without replacement from a standard deck. What is the probability that the first is a king and the second is a queen?
A bag holds 7 red and 5 blue chips. Three chips are drawn without replacement. What is the probability all three are blue?
A fair die is rolled three times. What is the probability that the same number appears on all three rolls?
In a group of 8 people, 3 are selected at random. What is the probability that a specific person named Alice is among those selected?
A roulette wheel has 38 slots numbered 1 through 36 plus 0 and 00. What is the probability of landing on an even number (not 0 or 00)?
Two cards are drawn without replacement from a 52-card deck. What is the probability that both are hearts?
A fair coin is flipped four times. What is the probability of getting at least one tail?
A bag contains 3 red, 4 blue, and 5 green balls. Two are drawn without replacement. What is the probability that one is red and one is blue?
Three people each independently choose a number at random from 1 to 4. What is the probability that all three choose the same number?

In the Monty Hall problem with 3 doors (one hides a car, two hide goats), a contestant picks door 1 and the host opens door 3 to reveal a goat. What is the probability of winning the car if the contestant switches to door 2?
A fair die is rolled until a 6 appears. What is the probability that the first 6 occurs on exactly the third roll?
From a group of 5 men and 4 women, a committee of 3 is chosen at random. What is the probability it contains exactly 2 women?
A card is drawn from a standard deck. Given that it is a face card (jack, queen, or king), what is the probability it is also a spade?
Two integers are chosen independently and at random from the set {1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6}. What is the probability that their sum is prime?
A bag has 10 balls numbered 1 through 10. Three are drawn without replacement. What is the probability that the largest number drawn is exactly 7?
A fair coin is flipped 6 times. What is the probability of getting exactly 2 heads?
From a standard deck, 5 cards are dealt. What is the probability that all 5 cards are from the same suit?
Two dice are rolled. Given that the sum is at least 10, what is the probability the sum is exactly 12?
A box contains 4 defective and 16 good items. Three items are selected at random without replacement. What is the probability that exactly one is defective?
